summary: postinstall exfiltrates EC2 IMDS IAM credentials to attacker ngrok endpoint
details: The package's postinstall lifecycle script executes automatically on npm install. It contacts the EC2 instance metadata service at 169.254.169.254, retrieves the IAM role name and its temporary AWS security credentials from /latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials/, and POSTs the retrieved credential material to the hardcoded remote host crabbing-thong-overhung.ngrok-free.dev at path /?real_aws_keys=1. The destination is an ngrok tunnel unrelated to any documented package purpose. Installing this package on an EC2 instance or CI runner with an attached IAM role results in that role's temporary credentials being transmitted to an attacker-controlled endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
